allow: Bash(conda run -n ai_dev python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,''stock_widget_ai''\); from main import main; print\(''main import OK''\)")

Bash(python -c "import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\); import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\); import matplotlib; matplotlib.use\(''Agg''\); from stock_widget_ai.gui import chart_widget as cw; print\(''[OK] font.family ='', matplotlib.rcParams.get\(''font.family''\)\); print\(''[OK] unicode_minus ='', matplotlib.rcParams.get\(''axes.unicode_minus''\)\); import torch; from stock_widget_ai.ml.models.transformer_model import TransformerModel; m = TransformerModel\(n_features=10\); print\(''[OK] encoder.enable_nested_tensor ='', m.encoder.enable_nested_tensor\); from stock_widget_ai.data.data_loader import DataLoader as DL; dl = DL\(cache_dir=''test_tmp''\); print\(''[OK] parquet path ='', dl._cache_path\(''X'',''5y'',''1d'',''parquet''\)\); print\(''[OK] csv path ='', dl._cache_path\(''X'',''5y'',''1d'',''csv''\)\); import shutil,os; shutil.rmtree\(''test_tmp''\); print\(''=== All OK ===''\)")
